address.address1: Jl. Bahagia, Ujung Kareung, Sukujaya Sabang Ie Meulee village

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The villas is good,infront of beach but the refregirator is not working..might be need aircon

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Not suitable for those who need air conditioning. Fredies' characteristic is that it doesn't use AC. But the downstairs room is very hot because there is no ventilation. The wifi also doesn't reach the room. The beach has a lot of coral, not recommended for swimming; it's only shallow but there are many beautiful fish.
comments.originalComment:
Ga cocok utk yg harus ber AC.. Ciri khas fredies mmg ga pake AC.. Tp kamar bawah sangat panas krn tidak ada fentilasi. 
Wifi jg ga nyampe kamar. 
Pantainya ful karang tidak rkom utk berenang, cm dangkal aja sdh byk ikan2 cantik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
This villas are straight on the small amazing beautifull coral beach, you look straihht from the veranda over the water , you have perfect equiped kitchen ,  but the breakfast been coming straight at rhe villa.is small shop equiped with drinks and snacks, beer and wine home,also you can order the time you like,
we planned to stay 3 days , but we staied 9 nights, you are close to the city and restourants, same owner rest, close , they have good food and drinks, also you can order take away. In the house you have all time fresh water for drink, 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, big veranda and living room, good wi fi ..we feel like our home  on the beach, thank to all pepple make this vacation so good for us, Thank you Frieddy for your attention and hospitality!
